figures.caption: Figure 2: Sample efficiency of WOMBET vs. online RL baselines across target tasks.
Figure 1: WOMBET pipeline: uncertainty-aware model-based data generation in the source task, followed by adaptive offline-to-online learning with iterative model updates.
Figure 3: Comparison of offline RL baselines and WOMBET across target tasks. Bars show offline performance on DS and the red dashed line denotes WOMBET’s post-adaptation return.
Figure 6: Ablation of WOMBET’s dual-criterion filter across target tasks.
Figure 4: WOMBET vs. offline-to-online baselines (offline RL with fine-tuning) across target tasks.
Figure 5: Comparison between WOMBET with adaptive sampling (blue) and a symmetric fixedratio variant (orange) across target tasks.
